Title: Enacts the "who you gonna call?  act"
Summary: Enacts the "who you gonna call? act"; classifies vehicles of the office of chief medical examiner of the city of New York as an emergency vehicle; classifies any actual or potential scene where the New York city office of chief medical examiner has an official role as an emergency operation; authorizes vehicles of the office of chief medical examiner of the city of New York to affix vehicles with blue, red and white lights.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to enacting the "who you gonna call? act"
